decision.rationale: The C4 design-only boundary is accepted and hardened, the C3 command set remains exactly two fixed help-only keys, no implementation drift is present, and known warnings do not change controlled runner behavior. The next step should review this decision packet before any future C4 probe implementation prompt exists.

proposed_future_probe_scope.command_source_policy: Any future probe command must be selected from a source-hardcoded allowlist created by a later approved implementation prompt; this packet does not add that allowlist.
proposed_future_probe_scope.config_policy: Configuration may identify only one later-approved key and must not supply command strings, executables, argv, args, shell flags, cwd overrides, environment changes, retries, credentials, endpoints, or write targets.
proposed_future_probe_scope.timeout_policy: Timeout must be required, bounded, and recorded in evidence.
proposed_future_probe_scope.cwd_policy: The future probe must run from the DevCockpitCore repository unless a later review narrows a different repo-local cwd.
proposed_future_probe_scope.output_policy: stdout and stderr must be captured as bounded excerpts with truncation flags.
proposed_future_probe_scope.redaction_policy: Local user paths and sensitive-looking values must be redacted before artifact write.
proposed_future_probe_scope.before_after_state_policy: Before and after DevCockpitCore repository state must record worktree, HEAD, branch, and remote parity.
proposed_future_probe_scope.write_policy: The command must not create or modify target repository files; any DevCockpitCore-local evidence write must be explicit in the later prompt.
proposed_future_probe_scope.validation_policy: Adapter validation remains ordinary agent-side validation evidence and must not run through controlled_runner_probe.
proposed_future_probe_scope.git_policy: The future probe must not merge, rebase, reset, stash, force push, push, or perform destructive git actions.
proposed_future_probe_scope.target_repo_policy: Target repository writeback is forbidden; target repositories may only be observed through existing read-only mechanisms unless later policy narrows otherwise.
proposed_future_probe_scope.network_policy: Network and external services are forbidden unless a later prompt explicitly authorizes a narrower audited path.
proposed_future_probe_scope.credentials_policy: Credentials, secrets, and external authorization are forbidden.
proposed_future_probe_scope.scheduler_policy: No scheduler, daemon, background loop, retry loop, or autonomy behavior is allowed.

controlled-runner-stop.use_when: Supervisor chooses to stop with the hardened C3 and C4 design-only state.

validation-fixture-hygiene-first.use_when: Supervisor wants to remove the historical pseudo-git-tag fixture warning before further C4 decisions.

c4-design-followup-fix.use_when: A reviewer finds a material gap in the accepted C4 design or hardening evidence.

pseudo_git_tag_fixture_warning.interpretation: Historical report fixture residue remains a validation-pack hygiene warning but does not affect C3 command keys or C4 implementation authorization.

optional_sibling_warnings.interpretation: Best-effort sibling repository warnings do not affect the DevCockpitCore decision packet.
